post-atomic-habits-request.text: Does anyone have Atomic Habits available this weekend? I can pick it up from the clubhouse.

post-money-book-share.text: I can bring The Psychology of Money to the clubhouse tomorrow evening if anyone wants to borrow it.

post-kids-books.text: Looking for early-reader books for a 6 year old. Happy to swap with puzzles or board games.

7255cb4e-da57-48dd-a791-975acc302966.text:
Best pick: Hero HF Deluxe

Best value for short daily commute. It is cheaper than Splendor, light, reliable, and mileage is usually around 65–70 km/l depending on traffic. Current listings show HF Deluxe around ₹58k–60k ex-showroom.

If you want stronger resale: Hero Splendor Plus

This is the safest all-rounder. Slightly costlier, but resale and service network are excellent. Hero lists Splendor Plus from around ₹77,557 ex-showroom, and mileage listings commonly show around 70 km/l, with real-world user reports closer to 60+ km/l.

If comfort matters more: Bajaj Platina 100

Good for bad roads and slightly longer rides. Bajaj lists Platina 100 with a 102cc engine and starting price around ₹68k ex-showroom Delhi.
